code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut in_num = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut stop = false
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n and not stop
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if in_num == 1
          let v = current * sign
          if v < 0
            stop = true
          else
            sum = sum + v
          end
          in_num = 0
          current = 0
          sign = 1
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = 1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
        in_num = 1
      else
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = 1
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num == 1 and not stop
    let v = current * sign
    if v < 0
      stop = true
    else
      sum = sum + v
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
when None
  println("partial=0")
end
